summary: W719 normalized fixed-target data now directly supplies WPP normalized fixed-target, functor-category localization, and finite-shape transfer inputs, and W774 uses that W719 bridge. This removes a local W774 reconstruction seam but does not construct a nullary original four-task positive witness.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
OriginalFourTaskProductData still requires caller-supplied bounded-derived stable data, W852 route data, or W961 closed-embedding closedness field data; no nullary product witness exists.

The new W719 bridge consumes a caller-supplied MetrizableWppNormalizedFixedTargetDataProviderW719 and caller-supplied WalkingParallelPair limit and colimit stability; it does not construct those values from nothing.
A concrete nullary MetrizableWppNormalizedFixedTargetDataProviderW719 value is still not available.
A concrete nullary MetrizableWppBoundaryRelationTargetClosednessNormalizedDataProviderW732 value is still not constructible from current source.
A nullary Dbounded.MetrizableStableInstanceBoundaryDirectLocalizationInputs value is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete ClosedEmbeddingClosednessFieldsInputW961 value is still not constructible from current source.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).
The direct-localization boundary still needs WPP transfer inputs and a source-side direct-localization triangulated core before a nullary stable package can be assembled.
remaining_work: Construct a concrete nullary W719 normalized fixed-target provider, W732 route-data provider, or direct-localization boundary input.
Use concrete source data plus direct-left-calculus and source triangulation evidence to build a nullary bounded-derived stable package.
Assemble and audit the final original four-task positive witness.
Build the Tier C review packet and only then permit update_goal complete.
verified_commands: jq -r '.packages[] | select(.name=="mathlib" or .name=="aesop" or .name=="Qq" or .name=="batteries" or .name=="Cli") | [.name,.inputRev,.rev] | @tsv' lake-manifest.json
